description: Parallel test: three independent stories that can all run concurrently

userStories.title: Add Multiply function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Multiply function in math.go
acceptanceCriteria: Add a Multiply(a, b int) int function to math.go that returns a * b
Add a doc comment for the function

userStories.title: Add string utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a new strings.go file with string helper functions
acceptanceCriteria: Create strings.go with a Reverse(s string) string function
Add a doc comment for the function

userStories.title: Add greeting function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Greet function that returns a greeting string
acceptanceCriteria: Create greet.go with a Greet(name string) string function that returns 'Hello, <name>!'
Add a doc comment for the function
